description: Implement LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT as per roadmap item 11. This establishes routing logic, writer path mechanisms, and next actor governance to support the coordination loop between ANALYST/EXECUTOR/AUDITOR roles.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap progression from completed item 10 (UNIVERSAL EXECUTOR/AUDITOR EXCHANGE LEDGER LOOP) to item 11 (LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT)
